overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of a neon-lit commercial district. The player approaches a street vendor, traverses narrow alleys, enters an adult entertainment establishment, and walks along wet city streets with futuristic architecture and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with street food vendor shop

events.description: approaches shop window to observe vendor inside
retreats from shop window and turns right

agents.ego_description: approaching a street vendor's shop window for a closer look, then backing away

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food preparation counter inside the shop

entered.detail: large rectangular shop window displaying a food vendor interior with warm lighting
dark colored sedan parked along the alley wall
horizontal green neon tubes mounted above the shop entrance

segments.scene_description: In a narrow back alley, the camera approaches a street food shop with green neon lighting. A car is parked to the left. The player moves close to the window to observe the vendor inside, then retreats. The environment is enclosed with concrete walls and artificially lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with scaffolding and utility structures

events.description: turns right from shop area into narrow passage with scaffolding
approaches alley exit with increasing light from main street ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through a tight alleyway with metal scaffolding on the left side

entered.detail: metal scaffolding with blue-green railings along the left wall
large industrial dumpster with yellow lid and graffiti
narrow corridor leading toward the main street with visible exit light

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrow service alley flanked by scaffolding on the left and a green dumpster on the right. The passage is dimly lit with artificial light, leading toward a brighter exit visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with corporate advertising and neon storefronts

events.description: exits narrow alley onto main street revealing Orbital Air building
approaches Jig-Jig Street entrance with prominent neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk toward a neon-lit entertainment district

notable_agents.action: person in green pants walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall glass building with large illuminated 'Orbital Air' holographic signage
neon sign reading 'Jig-Jig Street' in pink and blue colors
various commercial establishments with bright neon lighting along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley onto a wide commercial street, the massive Orbital Air building dominates the view across the road. The camera walks along wet pavement reflecting neon lights, passing scattered pedestrians and approaching the entrance to Jig-Jig Street with its distinctive pink neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: adult entertainment establishment interior with display cases and bar

events.description: enters Jig-Jig Street establishment through doors with mannequin displays
exits establishment back onto the main street

agents.ego_description: entering the establishment, walking through the corridor with display cases, then exiting back outside

entered.detail: glass display cases containing humanoid mannequins illuminated by red lighting
purple patterned carpet runner along the corridor floor
green neon sign reading 'OPEN' above the interior doorway
long bar area with stools and pink neon lighting in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the Jig-Jig Street establishment through a corridor lined with glass display cases containing mannequins under red lighting. A purple carpet leads toward a bar area with pink neon lights. After a brief look around, the camera exits back to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with restaurants and overhead pedestrian walkways

events.description: returns to main street from indoor establishment
passes Pizza Padre restaurant with yellow signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various storefronts and street vendors

entered.detail: yellow neon sign for 'Pizza Padre' restaurant with pizza slice logo
large concrete escalator and stair structure leading to overhead walkway
bright yellow automated vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Back on the main street, the camera continues walking past the Orbital Air building now visible to the right. The route passes a Pizza Padre restaurant, various neon-lit storefronts, and approaches a large concrete escalator structure. The wet pavement continues to reflect the colorful neon lights of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a neon-lit back alley into the expansive, vibrant chaos of a futuristic commercial district. It begins by approaching a green-lit street food shop tucked between concrete walls, before turning right into a dim service alley flanked by scaffolding and a green dumpster. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens onto a wide street of wet pavement reflecting brilliant neon lights, dominated by the massive Orbital Air building and the pink signage of Jig-Jig Street. The camera then transitions into a red-lit corridor of glass display cases and purple carpets within an entertainment establishment before exiting back into the open city. Finally, the movement continues past a Pizza Padre restaurant and various glowing storefronts, heading toward a large concrete escalator structure under the colorful glare of the cyberpunk cityscape.
